email.subject: Welcome to Build Without Code, Jane! Your Builder journey starts now

deliveries.welcomeContent:
# Welcome to Build Without Code, Jane! 🎉

---

## 1. Welcome, Jane!

You just made a smart move for your business. Whether you're still sketching out your idea or ready to build your first app, the Builder tier is exactly where you need to be right now. We designed it specifically for founders like you — curious, capable, and ready to move fast without needing a single line of code. Let's build something great together.

---

## 2. What's Included in Your Builder Tier

- **Weekly async coaching** — 30-minute Loom video reviews of your progress, questions, or builds
- **Private Discord community** — Connect with fellow non-technical founders building in real time
- **Monthly group Q&A call** — Live coaching with our team (recorded if you can't attend)
- **AI prompt templates library** — Ready-to-use prompts to accelerate your app-building workflow

---

## 3. Your First-Week Checklist

1. **Check your inbox** — Complete your 7-Day AI App Blueprint email course to get your bearings
2. **Download your tool comparison chart** — Review Lovable vs. Cursor vs. Bolt and pick your starting tool
3. **Join the Discord** — Introduce yourself in #introductions (pin your app idea!)
4. **Submit your first Loom question** — Drop a short video or written prompt about your current challenge
5. **Mark your calendar** — Save the date for your first monthly group Q&A call

---

## 4. Your First 30 Days

| Timeline | What's Happening |
|---|---|
| **Days 1–7** | Complete the AI App Blueprint + choose your build tool |
| **Days 8–14** | Receive your first async coaching Loom + begin your first build |
| **Days 15–21** | Engage in Discord, share progress, get community feedback |
| **Days 22–30** | Attend your first group Q&A call + submit Week 3 coaching check-in |

---

## 5. Support & How to Reach Us

- **Discord** — Best for quick questions; community responses within a few hours
- **Email** — jane@buildwithoutcode.com → hello@buildwithoutcode.com; replies within **1 business day**
- **Async coaching submissions** — Turnaround within **48 hours**, Monday–Friday

We're in your corner, Jane. Don't wait until things are perfect — just start. 🚀
